{{Quote|You were at Serroco, when they turned the Stereb cities into glass craters. At Duro, when Basilisk war droids rained like meteors onto the orbiting cities, and when the Mandalorians set fire to the Xoxin plains on Eres III—the fires that burn still.|[[Atton Rand]], to [[Meetra Surik]]|<ref name="KOTOR II" />}}
The '''Battle of Duro''' was a major battle of the [[Mandalorian Wars]], fought sometime in [[3962 BBY]]. The [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] campaigned across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from their territory in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] to reach Duro in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], a strategy they called [[Mandalorian Triumph]].

==The battle==
According to the former [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] soldier [[Atton Rand]], the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] assault force at [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] utilized, among other craft, [[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droids]] which "rained down like meteors onto the orbiting cities." During the battle, the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] laid waste to nearly the entire [[Planet/Legends|planet]], forcing the population to ally with the warriors against the Republic. The Neo-Crusaders also attempted to steal large amounts of war material from the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] that orbited Duro, but were prevented from doing so following the arrival of a fleet of [[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class cruisers]] under the command of the Jedi [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Darth Malak|Malak]].<ref name="Warfare" />

==Aftermath==
Following the battle [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Tol Cressa]] named Revan [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Republic Military/Legends|Republic's military forces]].<ref name="Warfare" />
